name: KitchenAid Go Cordless Hand Mixer battery included - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description: The power to make. The power to move. Create anywhere using the KitchenAid Go™ Cordless Hand Mixer in Shaded Palm, made by KitchenAid in partnership with Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Powered by a rechargeable 12v MAX removable battery, the new cordless hand mixer delivers 60 minutes of continuous run time* and performance, so you can cook wherever, whatever, and however you choose. *Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 12 volts. Nominal voltage is 10.8. Actual run time will vary based on recipe and/or attachments used. Battery life impacted by factors such as battery age and use.
